CustomField.description: The calculated payout for all creditors for this insolvency, net superintendant and trustee fees
CustomField.formula:
CASE(Insolvency_Type__c,
"Consumer Proposal", (( ( Payment_Amount__c * Number_of_Payments__c ) + Bulk_Payment_Amount__c - Trustee_Fees__c ) * ( 1 - $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Superintendant_Variable_Fee_Rate__c )),
"Division 1 Proposal", (( ( Payment_Amount__c * Number_of_Payments__c ) + Bulk_Payment_Amount__c - Trustee_Fees__c ) * ( 1 - $Setup.Trustee_Fees__c.Superintendant_Variable_Fee_Rate__c )), "Bankruptcy",0,
NULL)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The calculated payout for all creditors for this insolvency, net superintendant and trustee fees
CustomField.label: Creditor Payout
